facade_description: Two-storey converted Victorian semi-detached house with a 5.2-metre brick frontage and cross-gable roof. The ground floor has been converted to commercial use, currently housing multiple small food vendors (Momo Corner, NFT Cafe, Millie Creperie, Dipped Donuts). Two double-hung sash windows on the upper storey above the storefront. Party wall on the left side. A small yellow sale sign is visible. No direct photo observations are available; description based on database records indicating a late-nineteenth-century house-form building adapted for mixed commercial use.
